title: Public Meeting: Kahtnu Area Transit Fixed-Route Bus Service Update
summary: Please join us for an update regarding the Kahtnu Area Transit Fixed-Route Bus Service on Wednesday, Nov. 29 at 2 p.m. The meeting will be at Challenger Learning Center of Alaska, 9711 Kenai Spur Highway in Kenai. title: November 2023 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: November 21, 2023 SUMMARY Good afternoon. The month of November looks to be quite busy as we focus on the 2024 budget and the typical numerous weather-induced outages. Although it is a busy time, toward the end of November we start the holiday season…a season that seems to start earlier and earlier every year! As we continue to migrate indoors for the winter season, I hope this finds you and your family staying healthy. Last month we were ab...

title: Now taking nominations for the Innovators Hall of Fame 2024!
summary: SCoR created the Alaska Innovators Hall of Fame in 2014 to celebrate and honor outstanding individuals and inventions that put Alaska on the map as leaders in innovation and to contribute to Alaska’s growing culture of ingenuity.
